name: PluginBase.SymbolVisibility
summary: Defines the symbol visibility for model plug-ins in model views.

enum_values.name: DRAW_SYMBOL
enum_values.summary: Symbol is visible in model view.

enum_values.name: DO_NOT_DRAW_SYMBOL
enum_values.summary: Symbol is not drawn to model view. Plug-in must be selected from the view using created objects only.
